summary: Complete Manufacturing Module testing PASSED. All 21 backend tests passed. Full workflow verified: Add Raw Materials → Create BOM → Create Work Order → Issue Materials → Start Production → Record Production → QC Inspection → Complete. Inventory updates and journal entries verified.

issues: Console warning about chart dimensions (-1x-1) - should have minWidth/minHeight configured

ui_tested: Add Raw Material dialog opens and form works
Material table shows stock status badges (In Stock/Low Stock)

endpoints_tested: GET /api/manufacturing/bom/{id} - Get BOM details with cost breakdown
ui_tested: BOM page shows recipes with cost breakdown
Create BOM dialog with product selector and component adder
Labor cost and overhead percent fields

cost_calculation_verified.material_cost: Correctly calculated from raw material costs * quantities

workflow_steps_verified.result: Work Order created with WO number, estimated cost calculated from BOM
Raw material stock deducted, status changed to 'materials_issued', WIP journal entry created
Quantity completed updated, labor cost recorded, status changes to 'qc_pending' when complete
QC pass/fail recorded, finished goods added to product inventory, journal entries created for production complete and scrap

ui_tested: Work Orders page shows all orders with status badges
Create Work Order dialog with product, quantity, dates
Dropdown actions for Issue Materials, Start Production, Record Production, QC Inspection

inventory_updates.raw_materials_deducted: Verified stock decreases after materials issued
inventory_updates.finished_goods_added: Verified product stock increases after QC pass (9 units passed)

entries_created: MFG-WO-xxx: Material issue (Dr. WIP, Cr. Raw Materials)
MFG-WO-xxx: Labor cost (Dr. WIP, Cr. Manufacturing Labor)
MFG-WO-xxx: Production complete (Dr. Finished Goods, Cr. WIP)
MFG-WO-xxx: Scrap loss (Dr. Manufacturing Loss, Cr. WIP)

data_returned: status_summary - counts by work order status
this_month - production value and units produced

critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard charts show console warnings about dimensions - minor issue, recommend adding minWidth/minHeight to chart containers
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed raw materials, product, BOM, and work orders during testing - automatically cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: Manufacturing Module fully tested and working. Workflow: Raw Materials → BOM → Work Order → Issue Materials → Start Production → Record Production → QC Inspection. All endpoints verified. Existing data: 1 raw material (Cotton), 1 BOM (for AFTERLIGHT product), 2 completed work orders for TEST Blue Cotton Shirt.

woocommerce_stock_sync.note: WooCommerce sync is triggered as a background task after QC inspection completes. Actual sync depends on WooCommerce credentials being configured.

mocked_apis.note: All manufacturing APIs are fully functional with real MongoDB persistence
